---
title: "Teaching Experience"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
.teach-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 220px 1fr;
  gap: 40px;
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 2rem 1rem;
}
.sidebar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 20px;
  align-self: start;
}
.sidebar-title {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.8px;
  color: #888;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.sidebar-link {
  display: block;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #555;
  text-decoration: none;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 2px;
  border-left: 2px solid transparent;
}
.sidebar-link:hover {
  background: #f5f5f5;
  color: #111;
}
.sidebar-link.active {
  border-left: 2px solid #185FA5;
  color: #185FA5;
  background: #E6F1FB;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.teach-main {}
.teach-section {
  margin-bottom: 48px;
}
.section-heading {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  color: #fff;
  background: #185FA5;
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 4px 14px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.teach-card {
  border: 0.5px solid #e5e5e5;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 18px 20px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
  background: #fff;
}
.teach-card:hover {
  border-color: #85B7EB;
}
.teach-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 12px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.teach-title {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #111;
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
}
.teach-date {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #185FA5;
  background: #E6F1FB;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.teach-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-top: 6px;
}
.meta-pill {
  font-size: 12px;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  border: 0.5px solid #ddd;
}
.meta-pill.role     { background: #EEEDFE; color: #534AB7; border-color: #AFA9EC; }
.meta-pill.course   { background: #E6F1FB; color: #185FA5; border-color: #85B7EB; }
.meta-pill.location { background: #f5f5f5; color: #555; }

.training-item {
  display: flex;
  gap: 16px;
  padding: 14px 0;
  border-bottom: 0.5px solid #f0f0f0;
  align-items: flex-start;
}
.training-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.training-year {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #185FA5;
  background: #E6F1FB;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  min-width: 50px;
  text-align: center;
}
.training-desc {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #444;
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin: 0;
}

/* Academic experience styles */
.acad-block {
  margin-bottom: 32px;
  padding-bottom: 32px;
  border-bottom: 0.5px solid #e5e5e5;
}
.acad-block:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.acad-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 12px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.acad-role {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #111;
  margin: 0;
}
.acad-date {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #185FA5;
  background: #E6F1FB;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.acad-org {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #666;
  margin: 2px 0 12px;
}
.acad-list {
  margin: 0;
  padding-left: 18px;
}
.acad-list li {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #444;
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}
</style>

<div class="teach-layout">

  <!-- SIDEBAR -->
  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-title">Jump to</div>
    <a class="sidebar-link active" href="#lectures">Guest Lectures</a>
    <a class="sidebar-link" href="#projects">Project Lead</a>
    <a class="sidebar-link" href="#trainings">Trainings</a>
    <a class="sidebar-link" href="#academic">Academic Experience</a>
  </aside>

  <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
  <main class="teach-main">

    <!-- GUEST LECTURES -->
    <div class="teach-section" id="lectures">
      <div class="section-heading">Guest Lectures</div>

      <div class="teach-card">
        <div class="teach-header">
          <p class="teach-title">Systems Thinking and Complexity in Population Health</p>
          <span class="teach-date">Fall 2025</span>
        </div>
        <div class="teach-meta">
          <span class="meta-pill role">Guest Lecturer</span>
          <span class="meta-pill course">HLTH 688</span>
          <span class="meta-pill location">Texas A&M School of Public Health</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="teach-card">
        <div class="teach-header">
          <p class="teach-title">Digital Humanities Theory & Practice</p>
          <span class="teach-date">Fall 2025</span>
        </div>
        <div class="teach-meta">
          <span class="meta-pill role">Guest Lecturer</span>
          <span class="meta-pill course">DHUM 433 & 601</span>
          <span class="meta-pill location">Texas A&M University</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- PROJECT LEAD -->
    <div class="teach-section" id="projects">
      <div class="section-heading">Instructor / Project Lead</div>

      <div class="teach-card">
        <div class="teach-header">
          <p class="teach-title">An Agent‑Based Model to Test Telehealth Use Behavior Among Behavioral Health Providers</p>
          <span class="teach-date">Spring 2026</span>
        </div>
        <div class="teach-meta">
          <span class="meta-pill role">Instructor & Project Lead</span>
          <span class="meta-pill location">Aggie Collaborate, Texas A&M University</span>
        </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="teach-card">
        <div class="teach-header">
          <p class="teach-title">Designing an Agent-Based Model of Telehealth Using NetLogo</p>
          <span class="teach-date">Fall 2025</span>
        </div>
        <div class="teach-meta">
          <span class="meta-pill role">Instructor & Project Lead</span>
          <span class="meta-pill location">Aggie Collaborate, Texas A&M University</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- TRAININGS -->
    <div class="teach-section" id="trainings">
      <div class="section-heading">Trainings & Professional Development</div>

      <div class="training-item">
        <span class="training-year">2025</span>
        <p class="training-desc">Agent-Based Models for Population Health,<br>Department of Epidemiology, Columbia University Mailman School of Public Health</p>
      </div>
      <div class="training-item">
        <span class="training-year">2025</span>
        <p class="training-desc">Grant Writing Workshop,<br> Texas A&M Telehealth Institute</p>
      </div>
      <div class="training-item">
        <span class="training-year">2024</span>
        <p class="training-desc">AnyLogic Training Program, <br> AnyLogic Company</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ACADEMIC EXPERIENCE -->
    <div class="teach-section" id="academic">
      <div class="section-heading">Academic Experience</div>

      <div class="acad-block">
        <div class="acad-header">
          <p class="acad-role">Student Consultant</p>
          <span class="acad-date">Sept – Dec 2019</span>
        </div>
        <p class="acad-org">Perinatal-Neonatal Quality Improvement Network (PN-QIN), Boston, MA</p>
        <ul class="acad-list">
          <li>Provided best practices and educational materials for training of staff and clinicians to care for pregnant and post-partum women with substance use disorder without discrimination and stigma.</li>
          <li>Facilitated discussion with leadership to inculcate recommendation reports into management.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="acad-block">
        <div class="acad-header">
          <p class="acad-role">Student Consultant (Remote)</p>
          <span class="acad-date">Sept – Dec 2019</span>
        </div>
        <p class="acad-org">Promise for Haiti, Haiti</p>
        <ul class="acad-list">
          <li>Executed program diagnosis with programmatic interventions for organizational improvement.</li>
          <li>Led client-consultant meetings using multiple means of communication to develop work modalities with remote partners.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="acad-block">
        <div class="acad-header">
          <p class="acad-role">Student Consultant (Remote)</p>
          <span class="acad-date">May – Aug 2019</span>
        </div>
        <p class="acad-org">Health Action International, Amsterdam</p>
        <ul class="acad-list">
          <li>Created a mobile data collection platform using the CommCare application to monitor household access to insulin and the price of insulin in Tanzania, Peru, and Mali.</li>
          <li>Delivered user guides for administrators and data collectors and slide decks for clients on the development and use of applications.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="acad-block">
        <div class="acad-header">
          <p class="acad-role">Dental Intern</p>
          <span class="acad-date">Sept 2016 – Nov 2017</span>
        </div>
        <p class="acad-org">Terna Dental College & Hospital, India</p>
        <ul class="acad-list">
          <li>Performed general dental treatment and counseled patients with a history of smoking and chewing tobacco to create awareness and contribute to controlling the prevalence within the community.</li>
          <li>Managed incoming patient files and communication with recall patients through cross-department coordination among dentists, administrative staff, and patients.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

    </div>

  </main>
</div>

<script>
const links = document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-link');
const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.teach-section');
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  let current = '';
  sections.forEach(section => {
    if (window.scrollY >= section.offsetTop - 100) {
      current = section.getAttribute('id');
    }
  });
  links.forEach(link => {
    link.classList.remove('active');
    if (link.getAttribute('href') === '#' + current) {
      link.classList.add('active');
    }
  });
});
</script>
```
